title: Tries, Prefix Search, and String Algorithms · Invariant Lens: String Normalization
summary: Build an autocomplete and route-prefix service with predictable matching behavior. Planned artifact: Add and verify the dsa string normalization increment in a Unicode-aware prefix index and matcher. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Define Unicode normalization and case policy before indexing or comparison.
Implement insert, exact lookup, prefix lookup, delete, and bounded suggestions.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
